title: ChatGPT Power Workflows for Business

modules.title: Beyond the Basics: How GPT-4o Actually Works and Where It Fails
modules.sub: Understanding the model's real strengths, limits, and failure modes
modules.description: Learners map how GPT-4o reasons, retrieves, and generates output so they can predict where it excels and where it breaks down. They audit common professional use cases against the model's known failure patterns and leave with a calibrated mental model for smarter deployment.

modules.title: Prompt Craft for Business Outputs: Briefs, Reports, and Decisions
modules.sub: Writing structured prompts that produce polished, role-ready deliverables
modules.description: Learners build and test a personal prompt library targeting the documents they produce most — briefs, status reports, recommendation memos, and decision summaries. By applying role, context, format, and constraint framing, they convert raw ChatGPT output into publication-ready drafts that require minimal editing.

modules.title: Custom GPTs: Building Reusable Tools for Your Team
modules.sub: Designing configured GPT assistants tailored to specific team workflows
modules.description: Learners design and publish at least one Custom GPT with a defined persona, instructions, and knowledge base scoped to a recurring task their team faces. They practice iterating on system prompts and sharing the tool with colleagues, turning a one-off interaction into a repeatable team asset.

modules.title: Data Analysis, Code Interpreter, and Document Workflows
modules.sub: Using Advanced Data Analysis to extract insight from real business files
modules.description: Learners upload spreadsheets, PDFs, and reports to run analyses, generate charts, and surface patterns without writing code themselves. They build two end-to-end document workflows — such as summarising a financial report or cleaning a data table — that they can repeat every time the same file type arrives.

modules.title: Governance, Confidentiality, and Safe Business Use
modules.sub: Establishing guardrails that protect data and meet organisational standards
modules.description: Learners evaluate their organisation's data-sensitivity requirements and map them against ChatGPT's privacy settings, memory controls, and enterprise policy options. They produce a personal usage policy — covering what to share, what to redact, and when to escalate — that they can submit to or align with their team's AI governance framework.

synopsis: Most business professionals use ChatGPT at a fraction of its capability — this course closes that gap fast. From Custom GPTs to Advanced Data Analysis, you will build repeatable, professional-grade workflows that save hours and sharpen output quality across the functions that matter most to your role.
rationale: ChatGPT is the most widely adopted AI tool in professional settings, yet the gap between average and expert use translates directly into productivity and output quality disparities across teams.
learning_outcome: Build at least one Custom GPT and two reusable prompt workflows that immediately reduce time-on-task for high-frequency deliverables in your role.
source_signals: Adding a feature because ChatGPT incorrectly thinks it exists (score: 2571)
People tricking ChatGPT 'like watching an Asimov novel come to life' (score: 3085)
